title: Clickable Links Between Docs
excerpt:

posts.author: Jimmypenguin (Jimmy Lovett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe there’s a way to do this, but if there is I cannot find it.
I would like to be able to create a text hyperlink in a word doc that, when clicked, will take me directly to another one of our docs (or boards, but my current situation is with docs). This would allow for easy movement between docs. Thanks!

posts.author: Rio (Rio)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you use Monday in a web browser, I believe each doc or board has a unique URL that you can use for your text hyperlink. Board items also allow to link to items using the triplet menu on the left of them.

I don’t know how this will work when using the Monday desktop app as you do not have a way to find the URL.
